Day 5 - ATP 250 Libéma Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Libéma Open 2026 opens the ATP grass-court season in ’s-Hertogenbosch, Netherlands. Played at the Autotron Rosmalen venue, the tournament has been part of the ATP calendar since 1990 and is known for fast grass conditions favouring aggressive players and strong servers as competitors begin preparations for Wimbledon.

programme.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

programme.title: Ugo Humbert (FRA) vs Benjamin Bonzi (FRA) - ATP 250 Libéma Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Libéma Open 2026 opens the ATP grass-court season in ’s-Hertogenbosch, Netherlands. Played at the Autotron Rosmalen venue, the tournament has been part of the ATP calendar since 1990 and is known for fast grass conditions favouring aggressive players and strong servers as competitors begin preparations for Wimbledon.

programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. programme.title: Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Italy Major
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.desc: ATP 500 Terra Wortmann Open 2026 is held in Halle, Germany, at the OWL Arena. programme.title: EN One Weekly 2026 - Ep 24
programme.desc: The weekly show looking back at the best performances of ONE Championship's biggest stars ahead of highly anticipated upcoming bouts.

programme.title: Day 2 - ATP 500 Terra Wortmann Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 500 Terra Wortmann Open 2026 is held in Halle, Germany, at the OWL Arena. The tournament has built a strong reputation as one of the premier grass-court events outside Wimbledon, with several former champions using Halle as a successful stepping stone toward Grand Slam success on grass.

programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. programme.title: Martin Landaluce (ESP) vs Taylor Fritz (USA) - ATP 250 Boss Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Boss Open 2026 takes place in Stuttgart, Germany, at Tennis Club Weissenhof. The tournament switched from clay to grass in 2015 and has since become one of the key Wimbledon warm-up events. Played on fast outdoor grass courts, it regularly attracts top-ranked players and big-serving grass-court specialists.

programme.title: Tours vs Paris - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026

programme.title: Canada vs Bosnia and Herzegovina - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Canada and Bosnia-Herzegovina. The 2026 tournament will mark Canada’s third appearance at the FIFA World Cup, after 1986 and 2022 – as such, it’s the first time they have qualified for back-to-back tournaments.

programme.title: Haiti vs Scotland - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Haiti and Scotland, and Haiti’s first against an opponent from the British Isles. Scotland are winless in their last nine FIFA World Cup encounters with sides from the Americas. This run includes their only previous meeting with CONCACAF opposition: a 1-0 defeat to Costa Rica in 1990.

programme.title: Brazil vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage

programme.title: Germany vs Curacao - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Germany and Curaçao. Germany have won 14 of their last 17 FIFA World Cup matches against teams from the Americas. Germany have won the FIFA World Cup four times, the joint-most for a European nation alongside Italy. Overall, only Brazil have lifted the trophy on more occasions.

programme.title: Haiti vs Scotland - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Haiti and Scotland, and Haiti’s first against an opponent from the British Isles. Scotland are winless in their last nine FIFA World Cup encounters with sides from the Americas. This run includes their only previous meeting with CONCACAF opposition: a 1-0 defeat to Costa Rica in 1990.

programme.title: Brazil vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil and Morocco will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the second time, after a 3-0 win for Brazil in the 1998 group stage – a match that featured Ronaldo and Rivaldo’s first World Cup goals. Brazil and Morocco’s only encounter since their last FIFA World Cup meeting was in a March 2023 friendly, in Tunisia – it ended 2-1 to Morocco.
